states.name: Masamune
states.title: The One-Eyed Swordsman
states.description: Masamune was raised on a small island called Takagashima. Naturally quiet, she would hide whenever traveling merchants came to visit. However, she held deep affection for the other islanders, and they in turn were fond of the awkward Masamune.

states.name: Masamune
states.title: The One-Eyed Swordsman
states.description:
One summer night on the island, amidst the clamor of the festival, Masamune accepted a juice handed to her by a certain foreigner and drank it without a care.
But in the next moment, her consciousness sank into darkness—and when she awoke, she had lost the light in her left eye. What's more, her beloved island companions had transformed into oni.

states.name: Masamune
states.title: The One-Eyed Swordsman
states.description:
Masamune vowed to protect everyone.
She couldn't allow the islanders to come into contact with the outside world. If people from the Land of Peace found out, it might get reported, and a subjugation force could be sent. So Masamune took it upon herself to drive outsiders away from the island. But for someone as kind as her, it was an unbearably painful and agonizing role.
